programmes.show_description: Runaway Bump, Never Coming Back? Leonard has a bump hanging off his arm that looks like it's breaking through skin. Jess has a visible lump on her butt after falling downstairs. S2, Ep4
Romancing The Lump. Dr. Sandra Lee treats Heather, who has a huge growth on her leg and fears removing it could leave a keloid scar. And, Paul has a giant hump on his back. S2, Ep5
Erica's Story. 44-year old Erica binges on food when faced with adversity, and previous weight-loss surgery was unsuccessful. Can she get the support she needs to change her habits? S5, Ep6
Diana's Story. Diana is a prisoner to her 620-lb body. Desperate to break free of her food addiction, she embarks on a weight loss journey in order to regain her life. S5, Ep7

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Bridal Rule Breakers. Rule-breaking brides visit Confetti & Lace! Blue-haired bride Stephanie wants a dress with colour, and Virginia brings her fiancé to help choose a gown. S1, Ep9

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Price Of Style. Fashionista Reena asks David to find her a sexy dress with an unlimited budget! Bargain queen Kathryn refuses to bust her budget, but only likes the pricey gowns! S1, Ep10

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Defying Expectations. Cassie loves Kristen Stewart from the Twilight films, and wants a dress to transform her into a vampy princess! Tomboy Crystal seeks a more feminine look. S1, Ep11

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Sibling Support. Nesrin wants a mermaid-style gown, but her sister hates everything she's tried on. Jennifer races the clock to find a frock, but her sister gets entourage fatigue. S1, Ep12
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Mike Goes To The Opera. When Mike falls ill during a night out with Molly at the opera, Mike's mum and Molly clash over who can take better care of him. S1, Ep13
Molly Makes Soup. When Vince tries to strike up a friendship with Mike by inviting him to a big basketball game, Molly isn't pleased with their newfound bond. S1, Ep14
Jim Won't Eat. Molly is surprised when Mike's mum asks her to take care of her dog. Mike shocks Molly when he talks about being buried next to her. S1, Ep15
Race Of Superhumans. While Missy unknowingly becomes Sheldon's test subject, Georgie joins Mary's Bible study to spend more time with his crush, Veronica. S2, Ep11
Tummy Ache And Whale Metaphor. When Sheldon has to spend a few days in the hospital, he turns into the world's worst patient, and his behaviour takes a toll on everyone. S2, Ep12
Nuclear Reactor And Boy Lovey. While Sheldon attempts to build a nuclear reactor to power the neighbourhood, Georgie is heartbroken when he learns that Veronica has a boyfriend. S2, Ep13
The Ornithophobia Diffusion. Can friends with benefits still be friends without? Leonard and Penny try hanging out alone, while Sheldon must overcome his fear of birds. S5, Ep9
Flaming Spittoon Acquisition. Sheldon becomes jealous and considers taking his relationship with Amy to the next level when Stuart from the comic book store asks her out on a date. S5, Ep10
The Speckerman Recurrence. Leonard must face his fears after being contacted by his high school tormentor, while Penny realises that she might have been a bully herself. S5, Ep11
The Shiny Trinket Maneuver. Sheldon gets in trouble with Amy, and it's up to Penny to teach him how to be a better boyfriend. Howard deals with Bernadette's dislike of children. S5, Ep12
The Recombination Hypothesis. Everything might change when Leonard offers Penny a spur of the moment invitation to a romantic dinner for two on the 100th episode of the series. S5, Ep13
The Beta Test Initiation. Leonard and Penny experiment with dating again by 'beta testing' their relationship. Raj develops a weird bond with his phone's virtual assistant. S5, Ep14
The Friendship Contraction. Sheldon's selfish demands force Leonard to reconsider their friendship. Meanwhile, Howard tries to pick his astronaut nickname. S5, Ep15
The Vacation Solution. When Sheldon is forced to take a vacation by the university, he goes to work with Amy in her neurobiology lab. S5, Ep16
First Valentine's Day. Mike's special plans for his first Valentine's Day with Molly are thrown into jeopardy after he accidentally runs into Molly's ex-boyfriend. S1, Ep16
Joyce & Vince, Peaches & Herb. When Mike decides that the couch is his new best friend and he doesn't want to leave the house anymore, Molly goes out on the town with her sister. S1, Ep17
Mike's Feet. The bromance is in jeopardy! Mike and Carl get on each other's nerves after working too many double shifts together during a snowstorm. S1, Ep18
David, Goliath And A Yoo-hoo. Sheldon uses his new friendship with the school bully to boss Georgie around. Also, Missy steals Meemaw's makeup for Picture Day. S2, Ep14
A Math Emergency. Sheldon and Dr. Sturgis have a fight when Dr. Sturgis marks a question wrong on Sheldon's test. Mary takes over for Pastor Jeff when he's out sick. S2, Ep15
A Loaf Of Bread. Things spiral out of control when Sheldon boycotts his favourite bread company. Georgie consoles Veronica when she's dumped by her boyfriend. S2, Ep16
The Rothman Disintegration. When a corner office at the university opens, Sheldon must compete for it with his office nemesis, Barry Kripke. Penny gets an unusual gift from Amy. S5, Ep17
The Werewolf Transformation. A change in Sheldon's routine forces him to re-evaluate his entire life, when his barber is sick. Howard rethinks his decision to go into space. S5, Ep18
The Weekend Vortex. Sheldon chooses to participate in a guys-only weekend Star Wars gaming marathon rather than go with Amy to her aunt's birthday party. S5, Ep19
The Transporter Malfunction. It's a dream come true for Sheldon when he has a close encounter with his hero, Mr. Spock -legendary sci-fi icon Leonard Nimoy. S5, Ep20
The Hawking Excitation. When Wolowitz gets to work with world-renowned scientist, Stephen Hawking, Sheldon is willing to do anything to meet his hero. S5, Ep21
The Stag Convergence. Howard's wedding plans are in jeopardy after the guys throw him a bachelor party, and details of his sexual history are leaked online. S5, Ep22
The Launch Acceleration. When NASA reschedules Howard's mission and puts his wedding plans in jeopardy, he's forced to face his fears - and Bernadette's dad. S5, Ep23
The Countdown Reflection. When Howard and Bernadette decide they want to be married before his NASA space launch, the gang rushes to put on a wedding. S5, Ep24

programmes.show_name: New: Dr Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programmes.show_description: Superglue To The Rescue. 22-year-old Tierra has lumps on her ears that require medical attention. Plus, Dr. Zoe helps Dr. Lee with a patient with numerous head bumps. S1, Ep3

programmes.show_name: New: Dr Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programmes.show_description: Call Me Big Popper. Dr. Lee meets a patient with a big bump on his forehead. Plus, 30-year-old Shelby has developed mysterious bumps all over her body. S1, Ep4
The Incredible Bulk. Ruben is a personal trainer whose head growth has prevented him from seeing clients. Kaitlin has blue marks and scars due to long-term drug use. S4, Ep2
Hips Don't Lie. Rhonda has bumps all over her head, including a worrying horned growth. And, Dr. Lee treats Kevin, who has a huge lump protruding from his hip. S2, Ep6
Sleepless In Steatocystoma. Jen has growths on her ears that cause her depression, pain and vertigo. Plus, Juliet is in distress because of the bumps all over her neck and chest. S2, Ep7
Michael's Story. Michael's massive 632-lb body has left this husband and father dependent upon his family. If he doesn't lose weight, he will remain in jeopardy of losing everything. S5, Ep8
Nicole's Story. Weighing over 700-lbs, Nicole is on the verge of leaving her children motherless. She commits to the diet programme, but crisis threatens to derail all her hopes. S5, Ep9

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Picky Princess. Fussy bride Katie has fruitlessly tried on countless dresses and Antonia has a long list of what she doesn't want on a wedding dress. Can David and Danielle deliver? S1, Ep13

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Leather And Lace. Laura wants a frock to rock with her favourite leather jacket, and steam punk bride Julia needs a dress she can wear to the ceremony on a motorbike! S1, Ep14

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Dare To Be Me. Bride Lara beat a brain illness but the weight she gained makes dress shopping a trial - can David rebuild her confidence? Plus, tomboy Katie wants a young, fun frock. S1, Ep15

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Mother Knows Best. Steph wants a mermaid dress for her beach wedding, but her mum wants her princess-like in a ball gown! Christina is back for her first fitting - will mum approve? S1, Ep16

Peggy Shaves Her Legs. When Peggy and Molly have lunch together, Mike worries that his mum is telling Molly unflattering stories about his childhood. S1, Ep19
Opening Day. Mike and Carl's annual pilgrimage to the Chicago Cubs' Opening Day is interrupted when Molly comes along. S1, Ep20
Samuel Gets Fired. When Samuel loses his job and apartment, Mike offers to let him stay at his place - with interesting results. S1, Ep21
The Story Of Another Mary. Inspired by his hero, Albert Einstein, Sheldon tries his hand at the violin. Also, Mary and Meemaw secretly buy a pregnancy test. S2, Ep17
A Perfect Score. Sheldon moves in with Dr. Sturgis for the weekend to experience college life. A lonely Mary tries to bond with the other Coopers during his absence. S2, Ep18
A Political Campaign. Unhappy that school funds are going toward football rather than academics, Sheldon decides to run for class president. S2, Ep19
The Date Night Variable. Howard discovers that he can't escape his mother - even in space! Back on earth, meanwhile, Raj turns his existence as a third wheel into an art form. S6, Ep1
The Decoupling Fluctuation. After learning Penny is thinking about breaking up with Leonard, Sheldon tries to intervene. Howard is being picked on in space by the astronauts. S6, Ep2
The Higgs Boson Observation. While the pressure of being in space starts to take its toll on Howard, Amy feels threatened when Sheldon hires a young female assistant, Alex. S6, Ep3
The Re-Entry Minimization. When Howard returns from space, he doesn't get the hero's welcome he expected. Meanwhile, Game Night turns into a battle of the sexes. S6, Ep4
The Holographic Excitation. The gang celebrates Halloween at Stuart's comic book store. Leonard and Penny discover a new spark in their relationship with a scientific seduction. S6, Ep5
The Extract Obliteration. Sheldon's friendship with renowned scientist Stephen Hawking is threatened by a game of 'Words with Friends.' S6, Ep6
The Habitation Configuration. Bernadette pressures Howard to move out of his mother's house. Sheldon finds himself caught in the middle of a fight between Amy and Wil Wheaton. S6, Ep7
The 43 Peculiarity. Howard and Raj try to understand why Sheldon disappears every afternoon at 2:45. Leonard and Penny wrestle with jealousy in their relationship. S6, Ep8
The Act Of Breaking Girl Code. A girls' night out in the DR threatens to end Sophie and Liz's friendship. Vanja asks Tony to define their relationship. Gino meets Natalie's friends. S5, Ep4
All About Eggplants. Mykelti and Tony drive right into a tornado as Christine and David help them move to North Carolina. Kody and Robyn decide to begin anew. S13, Ep3
